cards.title: Metabolic & Insulin Panels
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • HOMA-IR: Fasting insulin × glucose / 405 (>2 = resistant)
  • Advanced lipids: LDL-P, sdLDL, Lp(a)
  • Organic acids test (OAT): Krebs, neurotransmitters
  • Comprehensive metabolic panel interpretation

cards.title: Advanced & Functional Tests
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • GI-MAP: Pathogens, bacteria ratios, zonulin
  • DUTCH test: Dried urine hormone metabolites
  • Spectracell micronutrient panel
  • Mycotoxin testing (ERMI, urine test)
